locations-overview.png.note: Operations > Locations, Lumon Fresh brand selected. Full list view with Status column showing Developing/Open/Inactive/Planned badges. locations-add.png.note: Actions > Add Location on the Locations table. Step 1 of the 'Add a new location' wizard (Location Name + Display ID). Agent-captured 2026-07-17, dom-sanitize applied. No cursor -- modal result state.

locations-discover.png.note: Actions > Find Existing Locations (the Google Places discovery feature described in the article as 'Discover Locations'). Search results list for the Lumon Fresh brand name. Agent-captured 2026-07-17, dom-sanitize applied. No cursor -- results state.

locations-bulk-actions.png.note: Two locations selected via row checkboxes, showing the bulk action toolbar (Set Location Status, Assign To Franchisee Entity, Assign To Deal Zone) -- covers both the bulk status update and bulk franchisee-assignment sections of the article. locations-detail.png.note: Location detail panel (Lumon Fresh Hotchkiss), Details tab -- shows the tab bar (Details/Chat/Tasks/Projects/Assets/Vendors/Catalog/Performance/Links/Activity/Social/Connections) and the top of the Location fields section. locations-vendors.png.note: Location detail panel, Vendors tab -- vendor assignments table (Usage, Category, Setup Status, Email, Phone) for a single location. Agent-captured 2026-07-17, dom-sanitize applied. No cursor -- read-only view.

locations-map.png.note: Locations table, Map view toggle -- split list/map layout with Mapbox pins and cluster counts. Agent-captured 2026-07-17, dom-sanitize applied. No cursor -- read-only view.
